# MatterAddDeviceRequest.DeviceCriteria.productID(_:)

**Case**

A device matches if it has the given product identifier.

## Declaration

```swift
case productID(Int)
```

## Defining the criteria

- **MatterAddDeviceRequest.DeviceCriteria.allDevices**: All device match without any filtering.
- **MatterAddDeviceRequest.DeviceCriteria.all(_:)**: A device matches the given criteria if it matches all of the individual ones
- **MatterAddDeviceRequest.DeviceCriteria.any(_:)**: A device matches the given criteria if it matches any one of the individual ones .
- **MatterAddDeviceRequest.DeviceCriteria.commissioningID(_:)**: A device matches if it has the given commissioning identifier.
- **MatterAddDeviceRequest.DeviceCriteria.fabricNode(rootPublicKey:nodeID:)**: A device matches if it’s paired to a fabric using the provided fabric and node identifiers.
- **MatterAddDeviceRequest.DeviceCriteria.not(_:)**: A device matches the given criteria if it does not match the provided criteria.
- **MatterAddDeviceRequest.DeviceCriteria.serialNumber(_:)**: A device matches if it has the given product identifier.
- **MatterAddDeviceRequest.DeviceCriteria.vendorID(_:)**: A device matches if it has the given vendor.
